description: In this episode, Sriram, founder of EigenCloud, discusses the transformative potential of AI agents in the crypto space, particularly focusing on the Eigen token and its capabilities. He explains how EigenCloud aims to enhance programmability and verifiability in blockchain applications, moving beyond current limitations [t=0:16].
topic_summary: Sriram introduces EigenCloud, emphasizing its goal to enable verifiable applications using cloud-scale programmability. He contrasts the computational requirements of Bitcoin, Ethereum, and Solana, highlighting EigenCloud's ability to run on extensive cloud resources while maintaining verifiability [t=90:20].
